title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at DTDC Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at DTDC Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the DTDC Global Group family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DTDC Global Group:
DTDC Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
